name: Legionary
specific_tips: Trade up with melee ploys to remove expensive enemy elites in one activation.
Focus fire on one threat at a time to fully remove key guns or leaders.
Exploit attrition and resilience by accepting chip damage but prioritizing trades.

name: Goremongers
specific_tips: Make them charge through your threat zone so you have follow-up counter-charges.
Layer screens and counter-chargers to blunt the first wave.
Exploit retaliatory and Ceaseless-style bonuses on counter-attacks.

name: Blooded
specific_tips: Advance aggressively into the mid-board to force fights around central objectives.
Use blast and grenades to punish models bunching behind cover.
Pick off mission-action specialists and leaders early.

name: Warpcoven
specific_tips: Use terrain and obscuring ploys to cross the board while minimising incoming fire.
Target their sorcerers and key gunners on vantage points first.
Capitalise on any failed focus fire by punishing exposed attackers.

name: Hunter Clade
specific_tips: Use terrain and obscuring ploys to cross firing lanes safely.
Bait overextension with a durable operative on an objective, then punish.
Target special weapons and vantage holders first.

name: Brood Brothers
specific_tips: Advance aggressively into the mid-board to contest objectives.
Prioritise multi-target attacks on packed shooting blobs.
Remove key support characters and special weapons early.

name: Fellgor Ravagers
specific_tips: Advance aggressively into the mid-board to force the horde to fight around central objectives where they cannot ignore your presence.
Prioritize multi-target attacks on clumps with blast, splash, and grenades to spread damage.
Cull objective runners first to limit their ability to flood objectives and score secondaries.

name: Canoptek Circle
specific_tips: Close to mid-range and force trades where your toughness and short-range firepower let you trade their expensive gunners.
Protect your leader and key gunners out of sight from enemy snipers until you can delete or pin those guns.
Capitalize on failed focus fire by punishing the exposed attackers instead of retreating.

name: Wolf Scouts
specific_tips: Wolf Scouts are aggressive melee hunters who advance relentlessly and overwhelm with brutal close combat.
Use the Icon Bearer or a Plague Marine Warrior as a screen to absorb the first charge, then counter-shoot with the rest of the warband at Point Blank range.
Focus fire to fully remove one operative per turning point; wounded Wolf Scouts are still lethal in combat.
key_threat: Precision shots and high-crit melee weapons.

name: Murderwing
specific_tips: Do not chase them. They have superior verticality and flight – let them come to you.
Use the 'Contagion' ploy to cut their move range and worsen their Hit stats, forcing them to engage on your terms.
Use the Malignant Plaguecaster's 'Poisonous Miasma' to apply Poison tokens at range, then trigger 'Contagion' to maximise the debuff as they close in.
key_threat: The Exarch's mobility and high-AP weaponry.

name: Corsair Voidscarred
specific_tips: Trade up in melee where you can leverage abilities to boost output.
Focus fire on high-value operatives.
Use attrition to outlast.

name: Void-Dancer Troupe
specific_tips: Make them charge through your threat zone for follow-up charges.
Layer screens and counter-chargers to blunt assaults.
Exploit retaliatory and Ceaseless bonuses.

name: Phobos Strike Team
specific_tips: Their infiltration and superior range let them set up ideal firing positions before you can close – advance early under 'Cloud of Flies'.
Use the Icon Bearer or Plague Marine Warrior as a screen to absorb initial fire while your heavy hitters close the distance.
Bait overextension with a durable operative on an objective, then punish their exposed position.
key_threat: Precision shots and high-crit melee weapons.

name: Kasrkin
specific_tips: They rely on coordinated synergy; use the 'Contagion' ploy to worsen their Hit stats and blunt their shooting output before they fire.
In close combat they are vulnerable – get into melee as quickly as possible.
Target the Melta gunner and Medic early to disrupt their key combos.
key_threat: The Kasrkin 'Melta' combo which can ignore your Feel No Pain.

name: Inquisitorial Agents
specific_tips: Trade up with melee.
Focus fire.
Attrition.

name: Chaos Cult
specific_tips: Advance aggressively.
Multi-target attacks.
Cull runners.

name: Blades of Khaine
specific_tips: Trade up melee.
Focus fire.
Attrition.

name: Mandrakes
specific_tips: Use grenades (Blight/Krak) to flush them out of cover – they cannot easily tank blast damage.
Even a standard Bolter shot with 'Plague Rounds' active is highly lethal; you don't need special weapons to threaten them.
Leave a Plague Marine watching backfield objectives to intercept shadow-step grabs.
key_threat: Mandrakes appearing from nowhere to snatch back-line objectives.

name: Nemesis Claw
specific_tips: Elite vs. Elite – your 'Disgustingly Resilient' (4+ roll against hits that deal 3+ damage) is your margin; trade efficiently and never waste attacks.
Use the 'Nurglings' ploy to reduce their APL, preventing them from striking and then falling back in the same activation.
Focus fire each activation to fully remove one operative rather than leaving multiple wounded.
key_threat: High-damage power weapons and specialized strike tactics.

name: Tempestus Aquilons
specific_tips: Advance aggressively.
Multi-target.
Cull runners.

name: Wrecka Krew
specific_tips: They outnumber you but lack your durability; use 'Disgustingly Resilient' to soak up their erratic shooting.
In melee you win the war of attrition; prioritize killing their 'Spanner' or Leader to break their synergy.
Layer screens to control which Orks can charge you each activation, avoiding being overwhelmed.
key_threat: Blighted targets being finished off by high-volume Ork melee.

name: Raveners
specific_tips: Use terrain to 'base' yourself against a wall or corner so only one Ravener can engage you at a time.
The Plague Marine Fighter's 'Flail of Corruption' is your MVP here – use its multi-hit potential against their large bases.
Maintain a rear guard operative to intercept deep strike or tunneling maneuvers.
key_threat: Deep strike/tunneling maneuvers that bypass your front line.

name: Celestian Insidiants
specific_tips: Melee trades.
Focus.
Attrition.

name: Kommandos
specific_tips: Guard flanks.
Durable on objectives.
Blast on uncloaking.

name: Wyrmblade
specific_tips: Aggressive advance.
Multi-target.
Cull.

name: XV26 Stealth Battlesuits
specific_tips: Visibility is the issue; maneuver to within 6-9 inches to negate their camouflage bonuses.
Don't waste long-range bolter shots – move up aggressively under the 'Cloud of Flies' ploy to close the gap safely.
Once within short range, your toughness and high-damage melee let you trade favourably with their fragile suits.
key_threat: Burst Cannons and Fusion Blasters that can one-shot a Marine.

name: Farstalker Kinband
specific_tips: Farstalker Kinband excel at holding cover at range; use 'Cloud of Flies' to advance safely and deny them clean shots.
Their Kroot bodies are fragile – use 'Plague Rounds' on Bolters to add Poison and Severe to every shot, threatening them without wasting special weapons.
Watch for Cold-Blooded hunter Kroot infiltrating your backfield; post a Plague Marine on rear objectives from Turn 1.
key_threat: Kroot infiltrators claiming back-line objectives before you can respond.

name: Exaction Squad
specific_tips: They rely on 'Ruthless Efficiency' synergy; break their team coherence by eliminating their leader early.
Use the 'Contagion' ploy to worsen their Hit stats and disrupt the coordinated fire their 'Ruthless Efficiency' relies on.
Get into melee as quickly as possible – their shooting is dangerous but they fold in close combat.
key_threat: High-volume fire combined with their 'Ruthless Efficiency' rerolls can quickly bleed your operatives.

name: Angels of Death
specific_tips: Angels of Death are supremely mobile and can strike anywhere; use the 'Nurglings' ploy to cut their APL and stop them striking then falling back in one activation.
Their highly specialized strike operatives can delete a Plague Marine per activation – never give them a free charge without a counter-charge waiting.
Use the 'Contagion' ploy in TP1 to soften their Hit stats before their strike operatives can get into optimal positions.
key_threat: High-damage power weapons and specialized strike tactics.
